zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Gresham The Younger於1390年出生在英國諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓時，他的父親Sir John Gresham42歲，母親Lady Margaret Stratton40歲。他於1417年與Margaret Rockwood在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍爾特享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gresham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from a place in Norfolk, so named from Old English græs, gærs ‘grass(land), pasturage’ + hām ‘homestead’ or hamm ‘enclosure hemmed in by water’.

variants.name: Grisham
meanings: English: variant of   Gresham  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Gresham The Younger was born in 1390, in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Gresham, was 42 and his mother, Lady Margaret Stratton, was 40. He married Margaret Rockwood in 1417, in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1460, in Holt, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Gresham The Younger est né en 1390, à Long Stratton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Gresham, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Stratton, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Rockwood en 1417, à Long Stratton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1460, à Holt, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gresham The Younger è nato il nel 1390 nel Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Gresham, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Stratton, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Rockwood nel 1417, nel Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1460, nel Holt, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Gresham The Youngerが1390年にイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオンで生まれた時，父Sir John Greshamは42歳，母Lady Margaret Strattonは40歳であった。1417年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオンでMargaret Rockwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホルトで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Gresham The Younger(이)가 1390년 영국 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Gresham(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Stratton(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴에서 Margaret Rockwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 홀트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Rockwood em 1417, em Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Gresham The Younger родился в 1390 г. в местности лонг страттон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Gresham было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Stratton, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Rockwood в 1417 г. в местности лонг страттон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1460 г. в местности холт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

Se casó con Margaret Rockwood en 1417, en Long Stratton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
